title: mastodon.social federation testing and bug fixes
description: Live compatibility testing against mastodon.social. This is the primary canary. Test every row in the compat matrix: Follow in/out, Reply in/out, Boost in/out, Like in/out, DM, Media, Edit, Delete. Document every bug found, fix it, re-test. Do not close this issue until the mastodon.social row in docs/compat.md shows all checkmarks.
design: Test with a dedicated smallhold test instance on a real domain. Test account on mastodon.social. Manual testing plus compat-test CLI. Document each failure mode found during testing in the issue comments before fixing.
acceptance_criteria: All columns in docs/compat.md mastodon.social row show checkmark; a mastodon.social user can follow, reply, boost, and like posts from a smallhold persona; smallhold can follow mastodon.social accounts and see their posts; DMs work; edited posts reflect the edit; deleted posts disappear
